title: [v4.9]`VM does not exist` error with podman machine ssh command
body:
### Issue Description

This is same issue https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/21183
PR https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/21207 is not reflected.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

1. `git clone https://github.com/containers/podman.git`
2. `git switch -d v4.9.4`
3. `make podman-remote`
4.  Run `podman machine ssh <command>`

```
% bin/darwin/podman machine ssh date
Error: date: VM does not exist
% bin/darwin/podman machine ssh podman-machine-default date
Mon Apr  1 00:16:00 JST 2024
```

### Describe the results you received

```
% bin/darwin/podman machine ssh date
Error: date: VM does not exist
```

### Describe the results you expected

```
% bin/darwin/podman machine ssh date
Mon Apr  1 00:16:00 JST 2024
```

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body:
Your PR was never backported so it is to be expected that it takes no effect on 4.9.
I don't think we plan any further 4.9 releases so I don't think we will fix that.
Thanks for your comment. This issue is closed as a record of a known issue.
